property.name: ranger.pdp.port
property.description: Port the PDP server listens on.

property.name: ranger.pdp.log.dir
property.description: Directory for PDP server log files.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.enabled
property.description: Set to true to enable HTTPS.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.keystore.file
property.description: Path to the keystore file (required when SSL is enabled).

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.keystore.password
property.description: Keystore password.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.keystore.type
property.description: Keystore type (JKS, PKCS12).

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.truststore.enabled
property.description: Set to true to require client certificate authentication.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.truststore.file
property.description: Path to the truststore file.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.truststore.password
property.description: Truststore password.

property.name: ranger.pdp.ssl.truststore.type
property.description: Truststore type (JKS, PKCS12).

property.name: ranger.pdp.http2.enabled
property.description: Enable HTTP/2 via upgrade on the connector. Supports both h2 (over TLS) and h2c (cleartext upgrade) alongside HTTP/1.1.

property.name: ranger.pdp.http.connector.maxThreads
property.description: Maximum number of worker threads handling simultaneous requests.

property.name: ranger.pdp.http.connector.minSpareThreads
property.description: Minimum number of spare worker threads kept ready.

property.name: ranger.pdp.http.connector.acceptCount
property.description: Queued connection backlog when all worker threads are busy.

property.name: ranger.pdp.http.connector.maxConnections
property.description: Maximum concurrent TCP connections accepted by the connector.

property.name: ranger.pdp.auth.types
property.description: Comma-separated list of authentication methods for incoming REST requests, tried in listed order. Supported values: header, jwt, kerberos.

property.name: ranger.pdp.authn.header.enabled
property.description: Enable trusted HTTP header authentication. Use only behind a trusted proxy.

property.name: ranger.pdp.authn.header.username
property.description: HTTP header name from which the authenticated username is read.

property.name: ranger.pdp.jwt.provider.url
property.description: URL of the JWT provider (used to fetch the public key).

property.name: ranger.pdp.jwt.public.key
property.description: Base64-encoded public key for verifying JWT signatures.

property.name: ranger.pdp.jwt.cookie.name
property.description: Cookie name from which a JWT bearer token may be read.

property.name: ranger.pdp.jwt.audiences
property.description: Comma-separated list of accepted JWT audiences. Empty means any audience is accepted.

property.name: ranger.pdp.kerberos.spnego.principal
property.description: Kerberos service principal for SPNEGO authentication, e.g. HTTP/host@REALM.

property.name: ranger.pdp.kerberos.spnego.keytab
property.description: Path to the keytab file for the SPNEGO service principal.

property.name: hadoop.security.auth_to_local
property.description: Rules for mapping Kerberos principal names to short usernames.

property.name: ranger.pdp.kerberos.token.valid.seconds
property.description: Validity period (seconds) for Kerberos authentication tokens.

property.name: ranger.pdp.kerberos.cookie.domain
property.description: Cookie domain used for the Kerberos authentication cookie.

property.name: ranger.pdp.kerberos.cookie.path
property.description: Cookie path used for the Kerberos authentication cookie.

property.name: ranger.pdp.service.*.allowed.users
property.description: Comma-separated users allowed to invoke PDP APIs for all services.

property.name: ranger.authz.app.type
property.description: Application type reported in audit records.

property.name: ranger.authz.init.services
property.description: Comma-separated list of Ranger service names to eagerly initialize at startup. Leave empty for lazy initialization on first access. Example: dev_hive,dev_hdfs

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.source.impl
property.description: Policy source implementation. Use RangerAdminRESTClient to download policies live from Ranger Admin.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.url
property.description: URL of the Ranger Admin server. Comma-separated for HA. Example: http://ranger-admin-1:6080,http://ranger-admin-2:6080

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.ssl.config.file
property.description: Path to the XML file containing SSL keystore/truststore settings for the connection to Ranger Admin (required when the Admin URL uses https://). The file uses the standard Ranger policymgr SSL property names: xasecure.policymgr.clientssl.truststore xasecure.policymgr.clientssl.truststore.credential.file xasecure.policymgr.clientssl.keystore (for mutual TLS) xasecure.policymgr.clientssl.keystore.credential.file

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.client.connection.timeoutMs
property.description: HTTP connection timeout (ms) for calls to Ranger Admin.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.client.read.timeoutMs
property.description: HTTP read timeout (ms) for calls to Ranger Admin.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.pollIntervalMs
property.description: How often (ms) to poll Ranger Admin for updated policies and roles.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.cache.dir
property.description: Directory for local JSON cache files (policies, tags, roles, userstore, GDS). The PDP can serve authorization requests from cache while Ranger Admin is unavailable.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.client.username
property.description: Username for connecting to Ranger Admin (basic auth).

property.name: ranger.authz.default.policy.rest.client.password
property.description: Password for connecting to Ranger Admin (basic auth).

property.name: ranger.authz.default.ugi.initialize
property.description: Set to true to enable Kerberos login for the Ranger Admin connection.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.ugi.login.type
property.description: Kerberos login type: keytab or jaas.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.ugi.keytab.principal
property.description: Kerberos principal for keytab-based login.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.ugi.keytab.file
property.description: Path to the keytab file for keytab-based login.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.ugi.jaas.appconfig
property.description: JAAS application configuration name for jaas-based login.

property.name: ranger.authz.default.use.rangerGroups
property.description: When true, group membership is resolved from Ranger's internal userstore (downloaded from Ranger Admin) rather than the local OS.

property.name: ranger.authz.audit.is.enabled
property.description: Master switch for audit logging.

property.name: ranger.authz.audit.destination.solr
property.description: Enable Solr as an audit destination.

property.name: ranger.authz.audit.destination.solr.urls
property.description: Solr URL for audit logging.

property.name: ranger.authz.audit.destination.hdfs
property.description: Enable HDFS as an audit destination.

property.name: ranger.authz.audit.destination.hdfs.dir
property.description: HDFS directory path for audit log files.
